title: Boosting Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of boosting, where sequential weak learners are trained, each focusing on the errors of the previous one, to create a strong ensemble model.
relationships: Initial Training Set is used to train Weak Learner 1
Weak Learner 1 makes predictions, calculating errors and updating instance weights
Updated weighted training set is used to train Weak Learner 2
Process repeats for N iterations, with each new learner focusing on previously misclassified instances
All weak learners are combined with their respective weights to form the Final Strong Learner
